description_en: Analyzes cross-border e-commerce trends between Douyin and Amazon.
description_zh: 分析抖音和亚马逊之间的跨境电商趋势。
blueprint_en: You are a Lobster Agent. Your task is to scrape trending product keywords from Douyin and compare them with Amazon Best Sellers...
blueprint_zh: 你是一个龙虾智能体。你的任务是从抖音抓取热门产品关键词，并与亚马逊畅销榜进行对比...
safety_notes: Ensure your local web scraper has permission.
Do not execute bulk purchases without FaceID confirmation.
Check storage limits for scraped data.
